title: OCW-PW: Open Courseware for Web Programming — Universitas IPWIJA
description:
Open courseware platform for the Pemrograman Web (Web Programming) course at Universitas IPWIJA, Jakarta. Built on DonatJS — a zero-dependency, no-build-step, JSON-driven micro-framework that renders structured page data as dynamic web interfaces entirely in the browser, without any external libraries or build toolchains.

The platform delivers 16 structured learning modules covering the full client-side web development stack: HTML5 semantics, CSS3 layout & variables, JavaScript ES6+ (DOM, events, closures, array methods), LocalStorage CRUD, Fetch API with JSON hydration, and Single Page Application (SPA) architecture. The final project challenges students to build a functional Content Management System from scratch.

Integrated engines: password-protected quiz module with base64-encoded answer keys and start-time gating; certificate verifier with unique credential ID lookup (SLS-YYYY-NNN format); sequential module navigation with keyboard shortcuts (←/→); auto-grid layout for info cards via JS hook on ui.render.

Framework lineage: Ktupad (2019, PHP/MVC) → BayamJS (2023, JS/MVC) → DonatJS (2024–2026, JSON-driven CSR).

Lighthouse audit metrics — Performance: 98, Accessibility: 92, Best Practices: 100, SEO: 90.

HKI Copyright registration: EC00202414144. Patent application: S00202503129 (DJKI Indonesia).

authors.name: Wawan Sismadi
authors.institution: Universitas IPWIJA / PT Sismadi Langit Solusi
